description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden chest of drawers with a rich, medium-brown wood grain finish. The cabinet features four large, flat-front drawers stacked vertically, each with a subtle lip for pulling, but no visible handles or knobs. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain running vertically, and the legs are simple, straight, and slightly inset, giving the piece a modern, minimalist appearance. The drawers are slightly recessed, creating a shadowed gap that serves as a grip for opening. The overall construction appears sturdy and functional, suitable for storing clothing, documents, or other personal items. Its clean lines and lack of ornamentation make it well-suited for contemporary urban interiors or office spaces.
description: A tall, modern wooden chest of drawers with four flat-front drawers and a minimalist design. The cabinet has a rich brown finish and no visible handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing four large, flat-front drawers with recessed grips and a clean, minimalist facade.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the cabinet and the slightly protruding drawer fronts, with no visible handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, uninterrupted wood panel with vertical grain and no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and the staggered drawer fronts.
